data.name: Temptation at Sunset Cove
data.detailed_description:
Temptation at Sunset Cove

A Week of Sun. A Lifetime of Choices.

When Ethan finally meets Lily—the woman he's shared a long-distance digital romance with for two years—the stage is set for a dream vacation at an exclusive tropical resort. But paradise has its price. Amidst sun-drenched beaches, hidden lagoons, and moonlit dinners, Ethan will face more than just rekindled passion. He'll navigate jealousy, temptation, and the kind of erotic discoveries that can either strengthen love... or destroy it.

Temptation at Sunset Cove is a fully voiced adult visual novel that puts you in control of Ethan’s choices as he and Lily explore their relationship across a single unforgettable week. Will their bond survive the seductions of the resort? Or will new desires take root and blossom into something even more dangerous?

🔥 Explicit, choice-driven storytelling
❤️ Multiple relationship paths and endings
🌴 Exotic resort setting with steamy, branching encounters
💔 Romance, drama, betrayal... and redemption

Whether you stay loyal, open your relationship, or give in to temptation, every decision leads to new possibilities—and consequences. Will you chase fantasy, fight for love, or embrace the chaos?

One week. Every choice matters.

data.short_description: An intriguing, choice-driven erotic story where the main character meets up with his internet girlfriend for a passionate week at a luxury resort. Indulge in steamy sex with a variety of gorgeous women, face temptation, drama, and desire—every decision leads to new pleasures… or consequences.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Your graphics card needs to support OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11.
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: A 2.0 GHz 64-bit CPU is recommended.
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Your graphics card needs to support OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11.
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MAC 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible or Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: graphics card that supports OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: MAC 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible or Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: graphics card that supports OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible or Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: graphics card that supports OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: x86
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible or Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
